Class AudioManager

java.lang.Object
logic.audio.AudioManager
public class AudioManager extends Object
Centralized audio utility for background music and sound effects.

Supports looping BGM, one-shot SFX, priority SFX that temporarily pause BGM, and random bubble-pop variation playback.

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    private static javafx.scene.media.MediaPlayer
    bgmPlayer
    Active background music player instance.
    private static double
    bgmVolume
    Global BGM volume in range [0.0, 1.0].
    private static final String[]
    bubblePops
    Bubble-pop sound pool used for random variation playback.
    private static javafx.scene.media.MediaPlayer
    priorityPlayer
    Player used for priority SFX that should temporarily override BGM.
    private static final Random
    random
    Shared random source for selecting bubble-pop variants.
    private static double
    sfxVolume
    Global SFX volume in range [0.0, 1.0].

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static void
    playBGM(String path)
    Starts looping background music from resource path.
    static void
    playPrioritySFX(String path)
    Plays a priority sound effect and pauses BGM until it finishes.
    static void
    playRandomBubblePop()
    Plays a random bubble-pop sound from the configured pool.
    static void
    playSFX(String path)
    Plays a one-shot sound effect at configured SFX volume.
    static void
    stopBGM()
    Stops currently playing background music, if any.

    • bgmPlayer

      private static javafx.scene.media.MediaPlayer bgmPlayer
      Active background music player instance.

    • priorityPlayer

  • Constructor Details

    • AudioManager

      public AudioManager()

  • Method Details

    • playBGM

      public static void playBGM(String path)
      Starts looping background music from resource path. If another BGM is active, it is stopped first.
      Parameters:
      path - classpath resource path to audio file

    • stopBGM

      public static void stopBGM()
      Stops currently playing background music, if any.

    • playSFX

      public static void playSFX(String path)
      Plays a one-shot sound effect at configured SFX volume.
      Parameters:
      path - classpath resource path to audio file

    • playPrioritySFX

      public static void playPrioritySFX(String path)
      Plays a priority sound effect and pauses BGM until it finishes.
      Parameters:
      path - classpath resource path to priority audio file

    • playRandomBubblePop

      public static void playRandomBubblePop()
      Plays a random bubble-pop sound from the configured pool.
